episodes.title: The Cult of NatureBoy: new four-part docuseries on Hulu
episodes.description:
The Cult of NatureBoy is a four-part true crime docuseries from ABC News Studios that premiered on April 28, 2026. You can currently stream it on Hulu and Hulu on Disney+. The series investigates the rise and fall of Eligio Bishop, a social media personality known as "NatureBoy" who founded the group Carbon Nation in 2016. It details how Bishop used platforms like YouTube and Instagram to recruit followers to live in "utopian" communes in places like Costa Rica, Mexico and Hawaii only for the group to devolve into a cult centered on manipulation and abuse. 

#newsheadlines #celebritynews #socialmedia
